sect1_p: The purpose of these Terms of Service (ToS) is to define the terms and conditions for the provision of CleanMyCSV services and the conditions of use of the Service by the User.
sect2_p: The Service is accessible free of charge to any User with internet access. All costs related to accessing the Service, whether hardware, software, or internet access fees, are exclusively the responsibility of the user. The publisher uses all reasonable means at its disposal to ensure quality access to the Service but is under no obligation to do so.
sect3_intro: The user agrees to comply with the following rules when using the data cleaning tool:
sect3_li1: Professional Use: CleanMyCSV is a technical tool designed to facilitate file processing. The user is solely responsible for the final verification of the data.
sect3_li2: Lawful Use: Do not upload files containing malicious code or data obtained illegally.
sect3_li3: Security: Do not attempt to bypass rate limits or compromise the infrastructure.
sect_cgv_prix_title: 4. Pricing and Payment Terms (Terms of Sale)
sect_cgv_prix_p: Plan prices are listed in Euros (€). As a French sole proprietorship (Entreprise Individuelle), VAT is not applicable (Article 293 B of the French General Tax Code). Payment is due immediately upon ordering. All transactions are fully processed and securely handled by Stripe. The publisher does not store any credit card or banking data.
sect_cgv_livraison_p: Since CleanMyCSV is a digital service, delivery is instantaneous. Upon payment validation by Stripe, the User receives an email containing a unique access link ('token') allowing them to use the tool according to the duration or terms of the chosen plan.
sect_cgv_retractation_title: 6. Right of Withdrawal & Refund Policy
sect_cgv_retractation_p: In accordance with Article L221-28 of the French Consumer Code, the right of withdrawal cannot be exercised for the supply of digital content not supplied on a tangible medium if the performance has begun with the consumer's prior express consent. By validating the payment, the User explicitly agrees to the immediate execution of the service and expressly waives their 14-day right of withdrawal.
sect4_p: These Terms are governed by French law. In the event of a dispute, and after an attempt at mediation, exclusive jurisdiction is assigned to the courts of Montpellier.

cookie.title: Privacy Protection
cookie.description: We use cookies to measure audience and improve your experience on CleanMyCSV. This data helps us optimize our data processing tools.
